docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EKSLER ALLA AS TO DEFENDANT PROPERTY MANAGEMENT MERCHANDISING-CENTRAL TOWERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
